name: Creamy Hash Brown Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Condensed cream of celery soup
8 oz. Small whole onions, drained and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the cream of celery soup, milk, and cream cheese. Cook over medium heat until smooth.
2. Combine the frozen hash brown potatoes (loose pack) and onions in a bowl.
3. Stir in the soup mixture.
4. Pour into a 10x6x1 1/2 inch baking dish.
5. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours or until the potatoes are tender.
6. Remove the foil; top with shredded cheese.
7. Return to oven to melt the cheese.
